q: How do I invite Jennifer to my server?
a: Click the Invite button on the home page. Make sure you have the Manage Server permission on the target Discord server.

For full functionality we recommend Administrator. If that is not possible, grant: Manage Guild, Manage Roles, Manage Channels, Manage Messages, Kick Members, Ban Members, Moderate Members and Manage Nicknames.

q: Slash commands are not showing up — what should I do?
a: Re-invite the bot with the applications.commands scope. If commands are still missing, wait 5–10 minutes for Discord to sync, then restart your Discord client.

q: Can I customize the welcome and leave embeds?
a: Yes. Run /welcomesystem welcome edit_embed and /welcomesystem leave edit_embed to fully change title, description, colors, images and thumbnails.

q: How does the Anti-Raid system decide when a raid is happening?
a: If more than join_limit members join within join_interval seconds — or accounts younger than min_account_age days join in bulk — Jennifer triggers the configured action and optionally locks the server.
Yes — all commands and features are completely free to use.
All configuration is stored securely and is only accessible to your server. Jennifer never shares data between servers.
